title: OpenAirInterface
note: Open-source 4G/5G RAN, core, and OAM project used as a credible cellular software alternative.

note: Open-source 4G/5G software radio and RAN project used as a cellular stack alternative.

title: RISC-V Ratified Specifications Library
note: Official specification library for the open standard ISA used in alternative and disruption analysis.

title: OpenROAD Project
note: Open-source RTL-to-GDS EDA project used to assess decentralized chip design tooling.
